log: ══ ROUND 1 ══
--- Young Red Dragon --- HP: 178/178 | AC: 18
REASONING: Multiattack on Plasmoid — Unarmored Caster (3 attacks).
ACTION: Multiattack (3× Bite) on Plasmoid — Unarmored Caster
→ Bite: [d20:1+10=11 vs AC 15] MISS.
→ Bite: [d20:15+10=25 vs AC 15] HIT! 13 damage. Plasmoid — Unarmored Caster HP: 54/67
→ Bite: [d20:19+10=29 vs AC 15] HIT! 17 damage. Plasmoid — Unarmored Caster HP: 37/67
--- Plasmoid — Unarmored Caster --- HP: 37/67 | AC: 15
REASONING: ROUND 1: 1 enemies. Opening with Hypnotic Pattern.
ACTION: Cast Hypnotic Pattern (Level 3 slot, 2 remaining). DC 16 WIS save. 30ft cube.
→ Young Red Dragon: WIS save [d20:5+4=9 vs DC 16] FAIL!
→ 1/1 targets affected.
